description: Bottom of a letter in Arabic script. Moderately wide space between the lines. Dealing with logistics, maybe mercantile. Asks to have something sent with Abū l-Ḥasan. The addressee is asked to greet/'serve' people on the sender's behalf (ukhdum ʿannī majlis al-shaykh al-ajall...). On verso there are accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals.
